zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：[震荡偏多格局]
zh.content:
当前以太坊/美元呈高位窄幅震荡，整体仍偏多头结构，价格贴近近期区间上沿，短线动能略有放缓但整体趋势未破位上行通道，多头仍占优

MACD指标显示动能柱维持正值，短期多头动能仍在延续，未出现明显背离信号。SMA20在1590附近形成支撑，RSI缺失暂不影响判断

上方阻力关注1621-1625区间，若有效突破或打开进一步上行空间。下方支撑在1610与1590区域回踩不破仍偏多格局中性

短线建议以区间操作为主，回踩1590-1610分批关注低吸机会。上方突破可顺势跟进止损可设1600下方，控制风险为主策

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is trading in a tight consolidation phase after a marginal 0.18% decline, holding firmly around the 1,616 area. Price action remains compressed between the session high and low, indicating low volatility and equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Despite the lack of strong directional movement, the structure still leans mildly bullish as price holds above the 20-period SMA, suggesting underlying trend stability rather than reversal pressure with sideways market conditions.

Momentum indicators are mixed but slightly constructive. The MACD reading at 11.45 suggests positive momentum is still present, even though the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of crossover strength. With RSI not available, price-based interpretation becomes more important. Trading above the 20-SMA near 1,590 reinforces a short-term bullish bias, though momentum appears to be flattening rather than accelerating.

Immediate support is located at the session low near 1,615.65, with stronger structural support at the 20-SMA around 1,590. A break below this zone could expose deeper retracement levels. On the upside, resistance sits at 1,621.5, followed by a potential extension toward 1,635 and 1,650 if buyers manage a clean breakout above the current range ceiling and volume confirmation required.

Given the current range-bound structure, a mean-reversion approach is favored over aggressive trend chasing. Buying near the 1,615 support zone with tight risk control below the 20-SMA can offer favorable reward-to-risk. Alternatively, a breakout strategy above 1,622 may target continuation toward higher resistance levels, but confirmation through volume expansion is essential before committing to directional positions in current market conditions.
